tasks.title: [RED] Public API tests
tasks.description: Write tests/test_public_api.py: test async_serve() returns Starlette app, zero-module registry→ValueError, invalid auth protocol→TypeError, invalid task_store protocol→TypeError, default task_store is InMemoryTaskStore, name/version/description resolution order, A2AClient importable from top level

tasks.title: [GREEN] async_serve() implementation
tasks.description: Implement async_serve() in src/apcore_a2a/_serve.py: resolve_registry/resolve_executor, validate ≥1 module, resolve name/version/description from registry config with fallbacks, default task_store=InMemoryTaskStore(), protocol validation for auth and task_store, call A2AServerFactory().create(), return Starlette app

tasks.title: [GREEN] serve() implementation
tasks.description: Implement serve() in src/apcore_a2a/_serve.py: same validation as async_serve, configure logging, set up SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers, run uvicorn.Server blocking. serve() calls async_serve() internals.

tasks.title: [REFACTOR] Public API cleanup
tasks.description: Verify __init__.py exports: serve, async_serve, A2AClient, __version__. Test ASGI embedding pattern with Starlette TestClient. Verify A2AClient import from top level has zero server imports. Run mypy.
